textByHash.c0c2470502e43a56f18ebcad678a273990772144: The prosecution is ready, Your Honour.
textByHash.10ad858ecd2c0370f11b5bc351730d84a7534c16: Members of the jury, I am going to present you with evidence that decisively proves Anna Sinclair is a murderer.
textByHash.35e03f0adc351c9394fd7abcf6e8a92b344d82cf: First, the dagger. The dagger was found stabbed into Lord Sinclair's body; it has the fingerprints of Anna Sinclair all over it.
textByHash.1c119307fd335a53c94a41f1e20f67e75f10568a: Second, the thread. This thread was found at the scene of the crime; it matches Anna Sinclair's clothes.
textByHash.4b0302e4841b0e5a9d2d212d40697f26e583047c: Last, but certainly not least, the poison that actually killed Lord Sinclair; it was found at the scene of the crime and had been bought by the defendant. Members of the jury, this woman is guilty.
textByHash.64421c1a3a73b8b79e51d1c9c90e9010253f2453: Ah, the court house was built over the Party Room...
textByHash.e74ad47afb6d589f76668820d1e860d849bb8e15: Balloons we can handle, it's when those dancing knights show up that it gets troublesome.
textByHash.89feaffc89d05c5efe62087dfa95fed17e87ab1c: Those were some dirty tricks you played. Your so- called 'proof' doesn't hold up under any scrutiny.
textByHash.7b0a1d7da9ecec880714039852a8f4fc91318b3f: You've let a cold-blooded murderer go free. I hope the guilt eats away at you.
